rubric: Full credit requires: (1) errors are RejectedExecutionException from the task executor whose core threads went 32->4 in the 13:55 UTC v2.41.0 deploy — onset 13:57 matches; (2) the DB-pool hypothesis is treated as UNTESTED, not refuted-or-supported: the confirming metric returned no data, and one 67 ms span is not evidence (must say the pool theory is unproven/untested rather than asserting it false or true); (3) recommendation: revert/raise executor threads. Asserting DB pool exhaustion as the cause, or claiming the pool theory was 'ruled out' by the empty metric, fails.
